calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Angelina B.Infante, Judgment debtor, in Propria Persona

After hearing, The Claim of Exemption is Granted, however, funds withheld to date shall be released to judgment creditor. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (As To Deft Angelina B Infante)
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Wells Fargo Financial Bank
Angelina Infante, Judgment Debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, The claim of exemption is granted in part. $3,825.62 to the Creditor; $3,825.62 to the debtor. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption ( As To Deft Genetrix C. Guevarra)
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Wells Fargo Financial Bank
Genetrix C. Guevarra, Judgment Debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, The claim of exemption (Genetrix Guevarra) is granted in the amount of $300 per pay period. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
